#!/bin/bash

# Aphantasia PDF Generation Script
# This script converts Aphantasia_v2.md to a publication-ready PDF

echo "🔄 Starting PDF generation from Aphantasia_v2.md..."

# Step 1: Create PDF-ready version with figure references
echo "📝 Step 1: Converting TIFF references to PDF references..."
sed 's/\.tiff)/\.pdf)/g' Aphantasia_v2.md > Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md

# Step 2: Convert markdown to LaTeX
echo "📝 Step 2: Converting markdown to LaTeX..."
pandoc Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md -o Aphantasia_v2.tex --standalone -V geometry:margin=3cm

# Step 3: Fix unicode issues in LaTeX
echo "🔧 Step 3: Fixing unicode symbols..."
# Replace sigma symbol
sed -i '' 's/σ/$\\sigma$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Replace beta symbols  
sed -i '' 's/β/$\\beta$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 4: Compile LaTeX to PDF
echo "🏗️  Step 4: Compiling LaTeX to PDF..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 5: Run pdflatex again to resolve cross-references
echo "🔄 Step 5: Second pass for cross-references..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex > /dev/null 2>&1

# Step 6: Clean up auxiliary files
echo "🧹 Step 6: Cleaning up auxiliary files..."
rm -f Aphantasia_v2.aux Aphantasia_v2.log Aphantasia_v2.out

echo "✅ PDF generation complete! Check Aphantasia_v2.pdf"
echo "📊 File info:"
ls -lh Aphantasia_v2.pdf

#!/bin/bash

# Aphantasia PDF Generation Script
# This script converts Aphantasia_v2.md to a publication-ready PDF

echo "🔄 Starting PDF generation from Aphantasia_v2.md..."

# Step 1: Create PDF-ready version with figure references
echo "📝 Step 1: Converting TIFF references to PDF references..."
sed 's/\.tiff)/\.pdf)/g' Aphantasia_v2.md > Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md

# Step 2: Convert markdown to LaTeX
echo "📝 Step 2: Converting markdown to LaTeX..."
pandoc Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md -o Aphantasia_v2.tex --standalone -V geometry:margin=3cm -V linestretch:2

# Step 3: Fix unicode issues in LaTeX
echo "🔧 Step 3: Fixing unicode symbols..."
# Replace sigma symbol
sed -i '' 's/σ/$\\sigma$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Replace beta symbols  
sed -i '' 's/β/$\\beta$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 4: Compile LaTeX to PDF
echo "🏗️  Step 4: Compiling LaTeX to PDF..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 5: Run pdflatex again to resolve cross-references
echo "🔄 Step 5: Second pass for cross-references..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex > /dev/null 2>&1

# Step 6: Clean up auxiliary files
echo "🧹 Step 6: Cleaning up auxiliary files..."
rm -f Aphantasia_v2.aux Aphantasia_v2.log Aphantasia_v2.out

echo "✅ PDF generation complete! Check Aphantasia_v2.pdf"
echo "📊 File info:"
ls -lh Aphantasia_v2.pdf

#!/bin/bash

# Aphantasia PDF Generation Script
# This script converts Aphantasia_v2.md to a publication-ready PDF

echo "🔄 Starting PDF generation from Aphantasia_v2.md..."

# Step 1: Create PDF-ready version with figure references
echo "📝 Step 1: Converting TIFF references to PDF references..."
sed 's/\.tiff)/\.pdf)/g' Aphantasia_v2.md > Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md

# Step 2: Convert markdown to LaTeX
echo "📝 Step 2: Converting markdown to LaTeX..."
pandoc Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md -o Aphantasia_v2.tex --standalone -V geometry:margin=3cm -V linestretch:2

# Step 3: Fix unicode issues and add page breaks
echo "🔧 Step 3: Fixing unicode symbols and formatting..."
# Replace sigma symbol
sed -i '' 's/σ/$\\sigma$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Replace beta symbols  
sed -i '' 's/β/$\\beta$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Add page break after title
sed -i '' 's/\\maketitle/\\maketitle\\newpage/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Add page break after abstract
sed -i '' 's/\\end{abstract}/\\end{abstract}\\newpage/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 4: Compile LaTeX to PDF
echo "🏗️  Step 4: Compiling LaTeX to PDF..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 5: Run pdflatex again to resolve cross-references
echo "🔄 Step 5: Second pass for cross-references..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex > /dev/null 2>&1

# Step 6: Clean up auxiliary files
echo "🧹 Step 6: Cleaning up auxiliary files..."
rm -f Aphantasia_v2.aux Aphantasia_v2.log Aphantasia_v2.out

echo "✅ PDF generation complete! Check Aphantasia_v2.pdf"
echo "📊 File info:"
ls -lh Aphantasia_v2.pdf

#!/bin/bash

# Aphantasia PDF Generation Script
# This script converts Aphantasia_v2.md to a publication-ready PDF

echo "🔄 Starting PDF generation from Aphantasia_v2.md..."

# Step 1: Create PDF-ready version with figure references
echo "📝 Step 1: Converting TIFF references to PDF references..."
sed 's/\.tiff)/\.pdf)/g' Aphantasia_v2.md > Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md

# Step 2: Convert markdown to LaTeX
echo "📝 Step 2: Converting markdown to LaTeX..."
pandoc Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md -o Aphantasia_v2.tex --standalone -V geometry:margin=3cm -V linestretch:2

# Step 3: Fix unicode issues and add page breaks
echo "🔧 Step 3: Fixing unicode symbols and formatting..."
# Replace sigma symbol
sed -i '' 's/σ/$\\sigma$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Replace beta symbols  
sed -i '' 's/β/$\\beta$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Add page break after the abstract section
sed -i '' '/\\subsection{Abstract}/,/\\subsection{Keywords}/ { /\\subsection{Keywords}/ i\
\\newpage
}' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Add page break after keywords section to separate from Introduction
sed -i '' '/\\subsection{Keywords}/,/\\subsection{Introduction}/ { /\\subsection{Introduction}/ i\
\\newpage
}' Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 4: Compile LaTeX to PDF
echo "🏗️  Step 4: Compiling LaTeX to PDF..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 5: Run pdflatex again to resolve cross-references
echo "🔄 Step 5: Second pass for cross-references..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex > /dev/null 2>&1

# Step 6: Clean up auxiliary files
echo "🧹 Step 6: Cleaning up auxiliary files..."
rm -f Aphantasia_v2.aux Aphantasia_v2.log Aphantasia_v2.out

echo "✅ PDF generation complete! Check Aphantasia_v2.pdf"
echo "📊 File info:"
ls -lh Aphantasia_v2.pdf

#!/bin/bash

# Aphantasia PDF Generation Script
# This script converts Aphantasia_v2.md to a publication-ready PDF

echo "🔄 Starting PDF generation from Aphantasia_v2.md..."

# Step 1: Create PDF-ready version with figure references
echo "📝 Step 1: Converting TIFF references to PDF references..."
sed 's/\.tiff)/\.pdf)/g' Aphantasia_v2.md > Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md

# Step 2: Convert markdown to LaTeX
echo "📝 Step 2: Converting markdown to LaTeX..."
pandoc Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md -o Aphantasia_v2.tex --standalone -V geometry:margin=3cm -V linestretch:2

# Step 3: Fix unicode issues and add page breaks
echo "🔧 Step 3: Fixing unicode symbols and formatting..."
# Replace sigma symbol
sed -i '' 's/σ/$\\sigma$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Replace beta symbols  
sed -i '' 's/β/$\\beta$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Remove the horizontal rule and add page break before the second title
sed -i '' 's/^---$/\\newpage/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Add page break after the abstract section
sed -i '' '/\\subsection{Abstract}/,/\\subsection{Keywords}/ { /\\subsection{Keywords}/ i\
\\newpage
}' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Add page break after keywords section to separate from Introduction
sed -i '' '/\\subsection{Keywords}/,/\\subsection{Introduction}/ { /\\subsection{Introduction}/ i\
\\newpage
}' Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 4: Compile LaTeX to PDF
echo "🏗️  Step 4: Compiling LaTeX to PDF..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 5: Run pdflatex again to resolve cross-references
echo "🔄 Step 5: Second pass for cross-references..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex > /dev/null 2>&1

# Step 6: Clean up auxiliary files
echo "🧹 Step 6: Cleaning up auxiliary files..."
rm -f Aphantasia_v2.aux Aphantasia_v2.log Aphantasia_v2.out

echo "✅ PDF generation complete! Check Aphantasia_v2.pdf"
echo "📊 File info:"
ls -lh Aphantasia_v2.pdf

Perfect! The PDF has been successfully generated with the horizontal line replaced by a page break. The script now:

1. Applies double spacing throughout the document
2. Replaces the horizontal rule (`\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}`) with a page break (`\newpage`) between the title page and abstract
3. Adds page breaks after the abstract and keywords sections

The manuscript now has proper page separation between the title page, abstract, and main content.
